text:
```json
[
  "Machine learning (ML), a foundational subfield of Artificial Intelligence, enables computers to learn, adapt, and improve from data without explicit programming by discovering patterns for predictions, decisions, and classification, thereby revolutionizing industries and solving complex problems; it is broadly categorized into supervised, unsupervised, reinforcement, and semi-supervised learning, utilizes various algorithms like neural networks, and is seamlessly integrated into daily life and industries through key applications such as predictive analytics, natural language processing, and image recognition, with deep learning being a specific type of ML that utilizes many layers of neural networks.",
  "Resources for starting a machine learning journey include community forums, open-source libraries, hands-on tutorials, and online courses."
]
```
json_data: Machine learning (ML), a foundational subfield of Artificial Intelligence, enables computers to learn, adapt, and improve from data without explicit programming by discovering patterns for predictions, decisions, and classification, thereby revolutionizing industries and solving complex problems; it is broadly categorized into supervised, unsupervised, reinforcement, and semi-supervised learning, utilizes various algorithms like neural networks, and is seamlessly integrated into daily life and industries through key applications such as predictive analytics, natural language processing, and image recognition, with deep learning being a specific type of ML that utilizes many layers of neural networks.
Resources for starting a machine learning journey include community forums, open-source libraries, hands-on tutorials, and online courses.
